formal: Bachelor's degree + 7 years of security management experience, OR 9 years of security management experience without degree (3 years in responsible charge)

plus.note: ASIS CPP is the de-facto credential for senior security/CSO roles in physical-and-information convergence.
First awarded in 1977; 50+ year track record.

minus.note: Cyber-only practitioners may find emphasis on physical security less directly applicable.

evaluation.rationale: All three personas agree at this tier; rationale reflects consensus.
